query:
SELECT id, firstName, lastName, email, phone, pipelineStage, applicationData, prospectusEmailSentAt, createdAt, adminNotes
FROM recruitment_prospects
WHERE LOWER(firstName) LIKE '%alastair%'
   OR LOWER(lastName) LIKE '%mcnoughton%'
   OR LOWER(lastName) LIKE '%mcnaughton%'
   OR LOWER(lastName) LIKE '%macnoughton%'
   OR LOWER(lastName) LIKE '%macnaughton%'
ORDER BY createdAt DESC;
